title: Blood Bridge
subtitle: MERN Blood Donation Platform
description: A comprehensive role-based system for donors and volunteers. Integrated Stripe for funding and complex filtering for donor locations.
longDesc: Blood Bridge is an ecosystem built to bridge the gap between emergency blood seekers and eligible donors. It includes real-time location mapping, background verification for volunteers, automated alert systems, and a micro-funding dashboard.
architecture: Client (React + TanStack Query) -> Gateway -> Server (Node.js + Express) -> Database (MongoDB) + Payment Gateway (Stripe)
challenges: Handling race conditions during real-time donor booking and maintaining precision in multi-tier location filtering.

title: Sharebite
subtitle: Community Food Sharing
description: Community-driven marketplace for surplus food. Features real-time request tracking and Firebase secure authentication.
longDesc: A platform built to reduce community food waste by connecting local restaurants and individuals with food surplus to nearby shelters and people in need.
architecture: Single Page Application architecture synced directly with Firebase Realtime Firestore and Auth handlers.
challenges: Optimizing Firebase subscription listeners to prevent heavy read/write usage costs on free tiers.

title: ParcelTrack
subtitle: Logistics & Delivery System
description: Full-stack logistics platform with automated routing and real-time delivery lifecycle management for Riders and Admins.
longDesc: An enterprise-grade package distribution management tool featuring real-time state machines for package tracking from sorting facility to last-mile delivery.
architecture: RESTful Micro-routing service optimized with custom state transition validators inside Express.js middleware.
challenges: Designing an intuitive and non-conflicting UX state system for riders updating deliverable drop points on the move.

title: Baby Shope
subtitle: Online Baby Essentials
description: A digital retail platform specializing in baby gear. Features product reviews, category filtering, and secure checkout simulation.
longDesc: A niche e-commerce storefront containing responsive custom filters, interactive rating systems, and client-side simulated secure checkouts.

title: Home Decor
subtitle: Interior & Furniture Shop
description: Curated assortment of stylish furniture. Focuses on aesthetic UI, smooth animations, and product catalog management.
longDesc: An aesthetic frontend heavy deployment showcasing high-end furniture items utilizing custom transition triggers and heavy media optimization.

title: Rashedul Islam
subtitle: Personal Portfolio
description: A professional showcase of skills and achievements. Built with high-performance components and optimized SEO techniques.
longDesc: Next-gen personal developer presentation site containing fluid framer-motion grids, server-optimized images, and high Core Web Vitals marks.

title: Tech Zone
subtitle: Modern Tech Retailer
description: Specializing in electronic devices and gadgets. Includes detailed specifications, search functionality, and secure UI for tech enthusiasts.
longDesc: Gadget inventory management front-facing application showcasing structural category divisions and rapid fuzzy client-side query indexing.
